zh.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor是Sir Edward John Burton的兒子，於1419年出生在英國史洛普爾隆諾。他於1441年與Christian Stapleton在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年5月之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Burton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor was born in 1419, in Longnor, Shropshire, England as the son of Sir Edward John Burton. He married Christian Stapleton in 1441, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died after May 1478, in his hometown, and was buried in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor est né en 1419, à Longnor, Shropshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Edward John Burton. Il a épousé Christian Stapleton en 1441, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après mai 1478, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Grey Friars London, London, City of Lond: Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor wurde 1419 in Longnor, Shropshire, England, als Sohn von Sir Edward John Burton geboren. Er hat 1441 in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England Christian Stapleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach Mai 1478 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnorは1419年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアロングノーでSir Edward John Burtonの息子として生まれた。1441年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーでChristian Stapletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1478年5月以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンチリスト チャーチ グレイフリアルズ ニューガトにて埋葬された。

ko.Grey Friars London, London, City of Lond: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor(은)는 1419년 영국 슈럽실르 론뇰르에서 Sir Edward John Burton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1441년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 Christian Stapleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 5월 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Christian Stapleton em 1441, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Grey Friars London, London, City of Lond: краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Burton Knight of Longnor родился в 1419 г. в местности лонгнор, шропшир, Англия. Его отца звали Sir Edward John Burton. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Stapleton в 1441 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после май 1478 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
